case_title: ARELLANO, SAMUEL G. VS TANG, SHU YUNG et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ARELLANO, SAMUEL G. AS TO DEFENDANT TANG, SHU YUNG HON'S WUN-TUN HOUSE(CA) LTD. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-29-1999 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO APR-12-1999 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-29-1999 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TANG, SHU YUNG

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARELLANO, SAMUEL G. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TANG, SHU YUNG HON'S WUN-TUN HOUSE(CA) LTD. PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED; 15 DAY WAITING PERIOD APPLIES; GIVEN TO NORA;
PLFT'S REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT: DENIED BY COMMISSIONER. NOTICED SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
